channel.title: Reverb — New Bass Guitars
channel.description: Recently listed bass guitars on Reverb

item.title: Fender MIM Jazz Bass 2021 - Sonic Blue — $725
item.description:
$725 · Very Good · Southside Guitars

This Fender bass was made in Mexico in 2021. It is in very good shape with some light play wear but no structural damage. It has been pro set up in our shop and it is playing great. It weighs 9lbs 3.4oz and comes with a gig bag. 


Please give us a call for an in-hand description - Southside Guitars,  Brooklyn, NY

item.title: FernandesTremor 5 Redesigned Late 2000s - Deep Dark Purple — $500
item.description:
$500 · Excellent · JVD Gear Outlet

Special Redesigned Fernandes Tremor 5. OBP-3 PreAmp, Nordstrand Music Man Style Humbucker Pick-ups, 24 Jumbo Frets, Rosewood Finger Board, Maple Neck, Alder Body.

This Bass has only been used a few times, Used to record the theme song to Monster Nation, and 2 other songs on the same album and as a back up bass for live shows.

item.title: Alembic E-Bass custom — $6,637.59
item.description:
$6,637.59 · Excellent · Josue 's Shop

wonderful E-Bass from Alembic

item.title: Epiphone Thunderbird IV 90s - 2000s - Relic bass neck — $150
item.description:
$150 · Good · Greg's Stuff

Epiphone Thunderbird IV bass neck. Taken from a Korean made Thunderbird IV bass I think from the early 2000s. Relic finish. Brand new Guyker tuners. I removed from my personal bass to make a “Fenderbird”. Was straight and in great order when removed. I never touched the truss rod, so I can‘t comment on it, but I assume it’s ok. I can check if needed.

item.title: Fender James Jamerson 1962 Precision Bass- 3 Color Sunburst 2026 (JJ260419) — $2,999.99
item.description:
$2,999.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Dealer/ Factory Warranty included. Please send us a message or give us a call if you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest.


Weight: 9 lbs 7.5 oz

The James Jamerson 1962 Precision Bass® – your gateway to the legendary sound that powered the Motown revolution.

James Jamerson is widely recognized as the single most influential bassist of all time. Consistently ranked #1 on “greatest bassists” lists, he laid down the groove on dozens of hit songs that defined the Motown sound. His incredible musical prowess and signature style didn’t just define a genre – Jamerson rewrote the rulebook for what was possible on electric bass, influencing legends like Paul McCartney, Marcus Miller, John Entwistle, and Geddy Lee.

The Bass That Built Motown

Jamerson’s signature instrument was his beloved 1962 Precision Bass – the foundation beneath countless hits that shaped popular music forever. This stunning era-correct tribute instrument celebrates James’ legacy and his inseparable association with the Precision Bass, delivering the authentic vintage sound and feel that defined an era.

Authentic Vintage Craftsmanship

Every detail honors the original, from the premium Heirloom Nitrocellulose Lacquer finish to the era-correct neck shape that captures the feel of Jamerson’s legendary instrument. The custom James Jamerson ‘62 Precision Bass pickup celebrates those unmistakable tones that anchored the Motown hit factory.

Premium Heritage Features

The Heirloom™ Nitrocellulose™ lacquer finish delivers the authentic spirit and aging characteristics that made the original so special. The premium tone and meticulous attention to detail ensure this bass performs to the highest professional standards. Experience the James Jamerson Precision Bass and feel the difference that inspired generations.


Specs

Accessories

Case/Gig Bag: Vintage-Style Brown (Orange Interior)

Recommended Gig Bag: FB1225 Electric Bass Gig Bag, P/N 0991622406 (Not Included)


Body

Body: Alder

Body Finish: Heirloom™ Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Body Material: Alder

Body Shape: Precision Bass®

Body Style: Solid Body


Electronics

Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone

Middle Pickup: James Jamerson '62 Split Single-Coil Precision Bass®

Pickup Configuration: S

Switching: None


General

Color: 3-Color Sunburst

Orientation: Right-Hand

Product Name: James Jamerson 1962 Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, 3-Tone Sunburst

Series: Artist Signature


Hardware

Bridge: Pure Vintage 4-Saddle with Threaded Steel Saddles

Bridge Cover/Tailpiece: Includes Chrome Bridge Cover

Bridge Mounting: 5-Screw Vintage-Style

Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top

Hardware Finish: Heirloom™ Nickel/Chrome

Neck Plate: 4-Bolt

Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell

Pickup Covers: Black

Strap Buttons: Vintage-Style

String Trees: Vintage-Style Disc

Strings: La Bella Flat Wounds .052 - .110

Tuning Machines: Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear


Measurements

Fret Size: Vintage Tall

Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)


Miscellaneous

Style: 1 Single-Coil


Neck

Fingerboard Material: Slab Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius: 7.25" (184.1 mm)

Headstock: Original Precision Bass® Shape

Neck Construction: 4-Bolt

Neck Finish: Heirloom™ Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Neck Material: Maple

Neck Shape: James Jamerson 1962 "C"

Number of Frets: 20

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 1.70" (43.2 mm)

Position Inlays: Clay Dot

Side Dots: Vintage Clay

String Nut: Bone

Truss Rod: Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

Truss Rod Nut: Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass- 3 Color Sunburst (V2448281A) — $2,499.99
item.description:
$2,499.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Showcase Dealer/ Factory warranty included. If you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest, please send us a message or give us a call.

Weight: 9 lbs 5.9 oz


The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

The late '50s to the early '60s was a watershed period in the development of the Precision Bass®, a time of transition that would see the introduction of many new appointments that would become synonymous with the P-Bass®. By 1960, the design of the P-bass had eclipsed the earlier cues culled from the Telecaster® - now the P-bass had a Strat®-style headstock shape, comfort-contours, pickguard mounted electronics and 4-saddle bridge. Adorned in 3-Color Sunburst and topped with a 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard, the 1960 Precision Bass represented a more refined, enduring aesthetic for the model.

Featuring a premium alder body, Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil P-Bass pickup and a substantial "C" shape hard rock maple neck mated with a 7.25" radius slab rosewood fingerboard, the American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass reproduces the quintessential tone and feel of the original.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.

Features

  • Alder Body
  • Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
  • Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups
  • "C"-Shaped Neck Profile
  • Slab Rosewood Fingerboard
  • Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuners


Specs

Accessories

Case/Gig Bag: Vintage-Style Brown (Orange Interior)

Recommended Gig Bag: FB1225 Electric Bass Gig Bag, P/N 0991622406 (Not Included)


Body

Body: Alder

Body Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Body Material: Alder

Body Shape: Precision Bass®

Body Style: Solid Body


Electronics

Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone

Middle Pickup: Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil Precision®

Pickup Configuration: Split Single-Coil

Switching: None


General

Color: 3-Color Sunburst

Orientation: Right-Hand

Product Name: American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, 3-Color Sunburst

Series: American Vintage II


Hardware

Bridge: Pure Vintage 4-Saddle with Threaded Steel Saddles

Bridge Cover/Tailpiece: Includes Chrome Bridge Cover

Bridge Mounting: 5-Screw Vintage-Style

Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top

Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome

Neck Plate: 4-Bolt Serialized

Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell

Pickup Covers: Black

Strap Buttons: Vintage-Style

String Trees: Vintage-Style Disc

Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

Tuning Machines: Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear


Measurements

Fret Size: Vintage Tall

Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)


Miscellaneous

Style: 1 Single-Coil


Neck

Fingerboard Material: Slab Rosewood

Fingerboard Radius: 7.25" (184.1 mm)

Headstock: Precision Bass®

Neck Construction: 4-Bolt

Neck Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Neck Material: Maple

Neck Shape: 1960 "C"

Number of Frets: 20

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 1.70" (43.2 mm)

Position Inlays: Clay Dot

Side Dots: Vintage Clay

String Nut: Bone

Truss Rod: Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

Truss Rod Nut: Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

item.title: Fender American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass- Olympic White 2026 (V26213) — $2,499.99
item.description:
$2,499.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Showcase Dealer/ Factory warranty included. If you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest, please send us a message or give us a call.

Weight: 8 lbs 13.0 oz


The Fender® American Vintage II series presents a remarkably accurate take on the revolutionary designs that altered the course of musical history. Built with period-accurate bodies, necks and hardware, premium finishes and meticulously voiced, year-specific pickups, each instrument captures the essence of authentic Fender craftsmanship and tone.

The late '50s to the early '60s was a watershed period in the development of the Precision Bass®, a time of transition that would see the introduction of many new appointments that would become synonymous with the P-Bass®. By 1960, the design of the P-bass had eclipsed the earlier cues culled from the Telecaster® - now the P-bass had a Strat®-style headstock shape, comfort-contours, pickguard mounted electronics and 4-saddle bridge. Adorned in 3-Color Sunburst and topped with a 4-ply tortoiseshell pickguard, the 1960 Precision Bass represented a more refined, enduring aesthetic for the model.

Featuring a premium alder body, Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil P-Bass pickup and a substantial "C" shape hard rock maple neck mated with a 7.25" radius slab rosewood fingerboard, the American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass reproduces the quintessential tone and feel of the original.

The instruments in the American Vintage II series are direct descendants of the original Fenders: designed for players with a fine appreciation for vintage Fender tone and feel and built with unmatched quality, down to the last screw. These are Fender electrics in their purest form: Fender American Vintage II, the stuff of legends.


Features

  • Alder Body
  • Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
  • Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil Precision Bass® Pickups
  • "C"-Shaped Neck Profile
  • Slab Rosewood Fingerboard
  • Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuners

Middle Pickup: Pure Vintage '60 Split-Coil Precision®

Orientation: Right-Hand

Product Name: American Vintage II 1960 Precision Bass®, Rosewood Fingerboard, Olympic White

Series: American Vintage II

Bridge Cover/Tailpiece: Includes Chrome Bridge Cover

Bridge Mounting: 5-Screw Vintage-Style

Control Knobs: Knurled Flat-Top

Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome

Neck Plate: 4-Bolt Serialized

Pickguard: 4-Ply Tortoiseshell

Pickup Covers: Black

Strap Buttons: Vintage-Style

String Trees: Vintage-Style Disc

Strings: Fender® USA 7250M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.105 Gauges), PN 0737250406

item.title: Fender JMJ Road Worn Mustang Bass Loaded Body - Faded Daphne Blue — $900
item.description:
$900 · Excellent · Cardinal & Crane Guitar & Coffee Company

Unleash vintage attitude with the Fender JMJ Road Worn® Mustang® Bass loaded bass body—offered in new condition for builders and modders who want that iconic Road Worn character with a fresh start. This loaded body is ready for your setup and includes the body components, giving you a solid foundation for a unique Mustang Bass build.

Please note: this unit is missing a bridge, so you’ll need to source a compatible bridge to complete the build and get it stage-ready.


15% Restocking Fee.


All items will ship in 3 business days. We discount shipping for multiple items. If you do need an item rushed, please contact me and I will try my best to accommodate you based on your schedule. Please feel free to contact me with any questions. I take great care to document all flaws in items and go overboard with shipping to make sure items get sent to you in the condition described. Thank you!

item.title: 1963 Fender Jazz Bass In Sunburst Finish with Original Hard Case — $21,402.72
item.description:
$21,402.72 · Excellent · Andy's Vintage Guitars

From the 4th year of production, this 63 years old Fender Jazz Bass is just perfection. Great weight, amazing tone, super comfortable neck profile, coveted Brazilian rosewood fretboard and a stunning 3 tone sunburst finish, all topped by the original rare cream tolex hard case, which was only made for less than a year. The alder body is resonant and light, finished in a beautiful 3 colour sunburst where the red hasn’t faded and still nice and vibrant. The pickguard doesn’t have cracks or the common snapped horns and doesn’t show signs of shrinking. The original 1963 pots work without scratches and the black bobbin pickups sounds delightful. Straight neck with a fully functional trussrod and a nice and smooth profile , so comfortable to play. Pickups covers in great condition as the rest of the original hardware. One for players and collectors.

item.title: Rogue LX205B-PWH Series III 5-String Bass 2010s - Pearl White — $150
item.description:
$150 · Very Good · Yooptone Music

Nice lower priced 5 string.

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V w/ Maple Fingerboard- Avalanche 2026 (US26009340) — $2,519.99
item.description:
$2,519.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Showcase Dealer/ Factory warranty included. If you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest, please send us a message or give us a call.

Weight: 9 lbs 13.9 oz


Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Jazz Bass® V features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.


Features

  • Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel
  • Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods
  • 10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots
  • Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching
  • 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners


Body

Body Material: Select Alder
Body Finish: Gloss Urethane
Body Shape: Jazz Bass®


Neck

Neck Material: Quartersawn Maple
Neck Construction: 5-Bolt
Neck Finish: Ultra Satin Urethane
Neck Shape: Modern "D"
Scale Length: 34" (86.36 cm)
Fingerboard Material: Quartersawn Maple
Fingerboard Radius: 10" to 14" Compound Radius (254 mm to 355.6 mm)
Number of Frets: 21
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
Nut Material: Graph Tech® TUSQ®
Nut Width: 1.875" (47.6 mm)
Position Inlays: Black Pearloid Dot - 7 mm
Side Dots: Luminlay®
Truss Rod: Bi-Flex™


Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Middle Pickup: Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Controls: Master Volume (with S-1™ Switch), Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Stacked Concentric Midrange Boost/Cut + Passive Tone Control, Stacked Concentric Treble Boost/Cut + Bass Boost/Cut, Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector
Switching: Pan Pot
Configuration: SS
Special Electronics: S-1™ Switch on Volume Selects Active Mode (Up Position) or Passive Mode (Down Position); 2-Way Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector (325 Hz or 750 Hz)


Hardware

Bridge: 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ (String-Through-Body or Top-Load)
Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
Tuning Machines: Fender® "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Keys with Tapered Shafts
Pickguard: 1-Ply Silver Anodized Aluminum
Control Knobs: Heavy Knurled Flat-Top
Neck Plate: 5-Bolt


Miscellaneous

Strings: Fender® USA 7250-5M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.125 Gauges), PN 0737250456
Legal Notice: WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - .


Accessories

Case/Gig Bag: Deluxe Molded Case (Included)

item.title: 2006 Schecter Stiletto Custom 4 Bass Natural Satin Flame Maple Original Case — $499.95
item.description:
$499.95 · Excellent · The Tyler Roe Collection

2006 Schecter Stiletto Custom 4 Bass in Satin Natural finish.

Excellent Condition

Made in Korea

Minimal playwear and everything functions properly.

Upgraded pre-amp with all sorts of push/pulls, tones and textures! Changed to black hardware.


With Original Hard Shell Case

-Instrument is sold *As Described* so please ask any and all questions before purchasing.

item.title: G&L L-2000 2000s - Common Finish — $1,800
item.description:
$1,800 · Excellent · Audio Design & Instruments

2005 G&L L-2000 w/G&L hard case

S/N: CLF37651

This bass was bought back in 2005. The owner never played it, for the last 21 years it stayed in it's case. The tags were never removed from the bass.

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V w/ Ebony Fingerboard- Ultraburst 2026 (US26001861) — $2,519.99
item.description:
$2,519.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Showcase Dealer/ Factory warranty included. If you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest, please send us a message or give us a call.

Weight: 10 lbs 3.5 oz


Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Jazz Bass® V features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.


Features

  • Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel
  • Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods
  • 10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots
  • Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching
  • 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners

Body

Body Material: Select Alder
Body Finish: Gloss Urethane
Body Shape: Jazz Bass®


Neck

Neck Material: Quartersawn Maple
Neck Construction: 5-Bolt
Neck Finish: Ultra Satin Urethane
Neck Shape: Modern "D"
Scale Length: 34" (86.36 cm)
Fingerboard Material: Ebony
Fingerboard Radius: 10" to 14" Compound Radius (254 mm to 355.6 mm)
Number of Frets: 21
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
Nut Material: Graph Tech® TUSQ®
Nut Width: 1.875" (47.6 mm)
Position Inlays: White Pearloid Dot - 7 mm
Side Dots: Luminlay®
Truss Rod: Bi-Flex™


Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Middle Pickup: Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Controls: Master Volume (with S-1™ Switch), Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Stacked Concentric Midrange Boost/Cut + Passive Tone Control, Stacked Concentric Treble Boost/Cut + Bass Boost/Cut, Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector
Switching: Pan Pot
Configuration: SS
Special Electronics: S-1™ Switch on Volume Selects Active Mode (Up Position) or Passive Mode (Down Position); 2-Way Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector (325 Hz or 750 Hz)


Hardware

Bridge: 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ (String-Through-Body or Top-Load)
Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
Tuning Machines: Fender® "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Keys with Tapered Shafts
Pickguard: 1-Ply Gold Anodized Aluminum
Control Knobs: Heavy Knurled Flat-Top
Neck Plate: 5-Bolt


Miscellaneous

Strings: Fender® USA 7250-5M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.125 Gauges), PN 0737250456
Legal Notice: WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - .


Accessories

Case/Gig Bag: Deluxe Molded Case (Included)

item.title: Fender Jazz Bass 50th Celebration 1996 - Maple — $1,499.99
item.description:
$1,499.99 · Very Good · Kurtis's Gear Depot

Fender Jazz Bass S/N V017719, made in Japan, 50th Celebration 1946 -1996. I personally bought this in 2007 for my daughter. The case does have damage for me transporting to play in the praise band locally. Jazz Bass is in very good condition, just the finish patch on the bottom which was there when I bought it in 2007. Bass is in original condition except for replacing the nut with an original fender part about 8 years ago. Let me know if you have questions.

item.title: Spector Euro RST 4 2020 - Turquoise — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Excellent · RPCANFIELD

Mint condition, barely played. At 6lb 14oz it's very light weight and comfortable to play. The only modification is Dual Design Straplocks. Plek Pro setup from Sweetwater.

I hate to sell it, but must.

item.title: Warwick Artist Series Robert Trujillo 5 String Bass - MIK - 2011 - Matte Black — $3,000
item.description:
$3,000 · Excellent · Cardinal & Crane Guitar & Coffee Company

Excellent condition Warwick Robert Trujillo 5-string bass (Made in Korea), featuring active electronics and the signature Warwick build/feel. Includes a Warwick road case.

Cosmetically and mechanically, the bass is in great shape with no issues—setup is ready to play. Brand new Robert Trujillo Signature Dunlop Strings. Great for classic punchy low end with tight, modern tone.

Details:

  • 5-string Warwick Robert Trujillo model (Made in Korea)
  • Active electronics
  • Includes Warwick road case
  • Excellent condition

15% Restocking Fee.


All items will ship in 3 business days. We discount shipping for multiple items. If you do need an item rushed, please contact me and I will try my best to accommodate you based on your schedule. Please feel free to contact me with any questions. I take great care to document all flaws in items and go overboard with shipping to make sure items get sent to you in the condition described. Thank you!

item.title: Fender 75th Anniversary American Vintage II 1951 Precision Bass- Butterscotch Blonde (US750500) — $2,899.99
item.description:
$2,899.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Showcase Dealer/ Factory warranty included. If you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest, please send us a message or give us a call.

Weight: 9 lbs 5.3 oz


75th Anniversary Precision Bass Collection

Introducing the 75th Anniversary Precision Bass® Collection: Celebrating three-quarters of a century of foundational tone and revolutionary design. Each 75th Anniversary Precision Bass model showcases the rich heritage and legendary tones that have made the P Bass® an unrivaled icon. From vintage purists to progressive players seeking cutting-edge features, rest assured there's a model that will deliver. Immerse yourself in the legacy of the Precision Bass and own a piece of Fender® history with the 75th Anniversary Precision Bass Collection.

American Vintage II 1951 Precision Bass®

Celebrate the birth of the electric bass with the 75th Anniversary American Vintage II 1951 Precision Bass. Crafted with a resonant swamp ash body finished in nitrocellulose lacquer, this instrument radiates vintage charm. The 1-piece maple neck and 7.25" radius fingerboard with vintage frets provide the smooth playability that players have cherished for decades. The 75th Anniversary 1951 Single-Coil Precision Bass® pickup delivers authentic tones with that foundational thump and clarity that has defined the sound of popular music for decades. Other appointments include a vintage-accurate serialized bridge with Pure Vintage Precision Bass® Fiber Saddles, Vintage-Style Reverse Gear Bass tuners and a 1-Ply Black Phenolic pickguard. This limited-edition model captures the essence of the original Precision Bass, a must-have for collectors and bass enthusiasts.


Features

  • Ash Body
  • Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer Finish
  • 75th Anniversary Pure Vintage '51 Single-Coil Precision® Pickup
  • 1951 "U"-Shaped Neck Profile
  • Pure Vintage 2-Saddle Precision Bass® with Fiber Saddles, Serialized
  • Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear Tuners


Specs

Accessories

Case/Gig Bag: Included: Vintage-Style Tweed (Crushed Red Interior)

Recommended Gig Bag: FB1225 Electric Bass Gig Bag, P/N 0991622406 (Not Included)


Body

Body: Ash

Body Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Body Material: Ash

Body Shape: Precision Bass®

Body Style: Solid Body


Electronics

Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone

Middle Pickup: 75th Anniversary '51 Single-Coil Precision Bass®

Pickup Configuration: S

Switching: None


General

Color: Butterscotch Blonde

Orientation: Right-Hand

Product Name: 75th Anniversary American Vintage II 1951 Precision Bass®, Maple Fingerboard, Butterscotch Blonde

Series: Limited Edition 75th Anniversary Precision Bass Collection


Hardware

Bridge: Pure Vintage 2-Saddle Precision Bass® with Fiber Saddles, Serialized

Bridge Cover/Tailpiece: Includes Chrome Bridge Cover

Bridge Mounting: 3-Screw Vintage-Style Hard-Tail

Control Knobs: Knurled Dome

Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome

Neck Plate: 4-Bolt

Pickguard: 1-Ply Black Phenolic

Pickup Covers: Black

Strap Buttons: Vintage-Style

String Trees: Vintage-Style Disc

Strings: Fender® USA 9050L Stainless Steel Flatwound (.045-.100 Gauges), PN 0739050403

Tuning Machines: Pure Vintage Reverse Open-Gear


Measurements

Fret Size: Vintage Tall

Scale Length: 34" (864 mm)


Neck

Fingerboard Material: Maple

Fingerboard Radius: 7.25" (184.1 mm)

Headstock: Original Precision Bass® Shape

Neck Construction: 4-Bolt

Neck Finish: Gloss Nitrocellulose Lacquer

Neck Material: 1-Piece Maple

Neck Shape: 1951 "U"

Number of Frets: 20

Nut Material: Bone

Nut Width: 1.70" (43.2 mm)

Position Inlays: Black Dot

Side Dots: Black

String Nut: Bone

Truss Rod: Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

Truss Rod Nut: Vintage-Style Butt Adjust

item.title: Ibanez SRH500F-NNF Bass Workshop Fretless Semi-Hollow Bass 2010s Natural Browned Burst Flat — $475
item.description:
$475 · Excellent · Adam's Bazaar Gear

Amazing fretless bad that can produce upright tones.

item.title: Stradi Symphony 6 string Bass guitar 2023 — $4,629.34
item.description:
$4,629.34 · Excellent · Claudine 's Gear Bazaar

Absolutely stunning bass in every way. The craftsmanship is impeccable! What a joy to play! I can also include a set of strings if what is on the bass presently is not your thing.

Specs:


Scale length: 34"


Body: Deeply Chambered Wenge


Top: Roasted Flamed Maple


Fingerboard: Ziricote


Neck: Purple heart/Afromosia (carbon fiber reinforced)


Frets: EVO Gold


Side dots: Brass


Tuners: Gotoh GB350


Bridge pieces: Hipshot on stainless steel plates


Pickup: Delano X-tender quad coil


Controls: Volume and tone slide pots, single-hum-single switch (all noise-cancelling)


Case: Custom fitted hardcase made in Italy

The bass will be packed professionally and shipped fully insured via FEdEx.

item.title: Ibanez SR505E 5 String Bass — $510
item.description:
$510 · Excellent · Jaiden's Gear

**Ibanez SR505E 5-String Bass - Excellent Condition**

Selling my Ibanez SR505E 5-string bass in **excellent/mint condition**. It's been well taken care of, is fully functional, and plays and sounds amazing. There are no issues with the electronics, neck, or hardware. The bass has only been lightly used and has been kept in great condition.

Features include:

  • ﻿﻿5-string Soundgear design
  • ﻿﻿Bartolini BH2 pickups
  • ﻿﻿Active 3-band EQ with passive bypass
  • ﻿﻿Slim, fast neck that's comfortable to play
  • ﻿﻿Great for church, gospel, rock, metal, jazz, funk, and more

This is a fantastic bass for anyone looking for a professional-quality instrument without paying full retail.

Feel free to message me with any questions or if you'd like more photos or videos. Serious inquiries only.

item.title: Gibson RD Artist Bass 1978 Natural Upgraded Hipshot bridge w case — $2,099
item.description:
$2,099 · Very Good · The Wigwam

Great shape for its age, sounds and plays great! Includes nice hardshell case, upgraded bridge, and super cool natural back panels. Setup nicely with straight neck and no buzz, nice low action too.


Offers considered

item.title: Fender Bullet Bass Deluxe (B-34) 1980 - Walnut (Mocha) w/ OHSC — $1,850
item.description:
$1,850 · Very Good · Zachary's Shop

This is an awesome Fender made in USA Bullet Bass Deluxe in rare brown / mocha color! Some dings and dents, but overall good condition. the original pickguard cracked so I got a shielded cream one from WD pickguards ($85 shipped) and had to file down the neck pocket, it’s not the cleanest job, but could be cleaned up if desired. You don’t notice it unless you are close and looking for it. Bass also comes with another white pickguard from WD. Will upload more photos soon, but comes with original hard shell case! Bass in video is not this actual bass.


Thanks for looking!

item.title: Fender Medium Scale PB-331 Precision Bass Mid 80s - Black — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Very Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

You know you have been trying to find a Fender version of the PB-331, well here is one. These are so hard to find and especially in this good of condition.

Fitted with Seymore Duncan PUP and all OEM parts included.

item.title: Fender Fender American Performer Mustang Bass 2021 - Sunburst — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Excellent · Shawn's Gear Locker

In excellent condition and plays amazing.

item.title: Fender Short Scale JB62 2024 - Surf Green — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Excellent · Shawn's Gear Locker

Hard to find in the USA. These short scale Jazz Basses are amazing.

Currently fitted with Aquilar PUP and comes with all OEM parts

item.title: used Typhoon Blue 5-String Electric Bass — $165.94
item.description:
$165.94 · Very Good · Connors Music

Overview

This is a very good condition Typhoon 5-string electric bass in translucent blue finish. Combining an ergonomic body design with high-output pickups, this bass is built to be versatile but affordable! 

Key Features & Specifications

  • Configuration: 5-String (Standard B-E-A-D-G tuning)

  • Finish: Translucent Blue (highlights the underlying wood grain)

  • Scale Length: 34" Full Scale for optimal low-end string tension

  • Pickups: Dual high-output humbuckers / single-coil combination providing exceptional clarity and punch

  • Controls: Master Volume, Master Tone, and Dynamic Pickup Blend knob

  • Hardware: Chrome hardware, heavy-duty fixed bridge, and die-cast tuners for excellent tuning stability

item.title: Fender Medium Scale Jazz Bass 2012 - Sunburst — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Very Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

Plays great and sounds amazing. A perfect fitting bass


Setup with Aguilar PUP and comes with all OEM parts

item.title: St George / Teisco Bass Mid to late 60s - Tobacco Burst — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Fair · Groove Express

1960’s St. George / Teisco MIJ Bass in tobacco burst. Full 34” scale bass with single pickup, chrome guard, and original hardware and electronics. Shows wear and age throughout (checking and scuffs). Headstock was repaired at some point and is very stable. Sounds great and plays comfortable.


Does not come with the hard case pictured but will be packed securely

item.title: Fender Medium Scale Jazz Bass JB62M 2011 - Black — $1,300
item.description:
$1,300 · Very Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

very nice bass that is a perfect fit

Seymore Duncan PUP installed and will come with all OEM hardware.

item.title: Fender Aerodyne J Bass - Medium Scale 2015 - Black — $1,100
item.description:
$1,100 · Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

Hard to find Aerodyne bass in medium scale. This is a perfect gig'n instrument. perfect fit and not too heavy.

item.title: Atelier Z OTB-Type#2 — $2,000
item.description:
$2,000 · Excellent · Shawn's Gear Locker

What a great instrument. So well built and plays great!

item.title: Dingwall NG3 Adam "Nolly" Getgood 5-String 2021 — $2,500
item.description:
$2,500 · Excellent · John's Studio Depot

Selling my 2021 Dingy NG3-5 in excellent condition. Purchased brand new from Nuts and Saddles. I’m the only owner. Currently setup standard with Dingwall nickels 45-130. It comes with the original Dingwall bag and setup tools. Upgraded with Schaller strap locks. The bass will be packed carefully and shipped in the original Dingwall shipping box. Hope it goes to a good home!

item.title: Epiphone EA-260 70s - Red — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

All working and plays like a vintage axe will.

item.title: Fender Aerodyne 2018 - Black — $500
item.description:
$500 · Good · Scott's Gear Garage

Bass plays great it just has some scuff from gaffers tape that was used to secure a strap when performing. There is a very slight (and fixable) hum on the pickups but if you know how to troubleshoot that kind of thing, then this is a great bass for you to grab!

item.title: Greco BOB-65 “Princess Princess” Atsuko Watanabe Signature Bass MIJ 1980s — $399.99
item.description:
$399.99 · Good · Groove Express

Greco BOB 65, the official Atsuko Watanabe (Princess Princess) signature bass from the late 1980s. "Princess Princess" was one of Japan’s biggest all female rock bands. Few ever left Japan, making this an especially scarce find in the US.

Finish has aged and shows dings/chips, particularly around edges,headstock and neck. Hardware has natural patina consistent with its age. Neck is solid and straight, frets have good life left, and the truss rod functions. Electronics work properly, pickups are strong and responsive.

item.title: Squier Precision Bass Medium Scale 1987 - Frozen Berry Metallic — $1,200
item.description:
$1,200 · Very Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

MIJ medium scale (32") Squier Precision, refinished in Frozen Berry Metallic. This one is from the golden age of Squier Japan (1984-1987) with an E serial number.

I recently had this one professionally refinished. They did a great job, and I guarantee you won't find this color anywhere else. Frozen Berry Metallic is a Porsche factory color, and it's very close to Burgundy Mist. It really pops in the light, as you can see. It has not been taken out of my house since the refinish.

In addition to the refin, I made a couple other minor changes:

-KellingSound solderless wiring harness with CTS A250k split shaft pots. ITW .047 Tone cap, Switchcraft jack (will include original harness)

-Replacement 3-ply black pickguard (will include 3-ply white original)

-Extra set of medium scale flatwound strings included. Not sure of the brand but they are in good shape. Currently strung with brand new LaBella roundwounds.

I'm also including a Hipshot BT10 Xtender drop tuner that I never got around to installing. No case, but will be packed well.

Weight is super light at 7 lbs, 9 oz.

item.title: Guyatone EB-9 Custom MIJ Bass 1976 Natural w/ OHSC — $899.99
item.description:
$899.99 · Good · Groove Express

Vintage 1976 Guyatone EB-9 Custom, made in Japan. Rare offset bass with binding and star inlays.


Plays great with a solid neck and comfortable action. Pickups deliver a bright and punchy tone.

Honest wear throughout. Binding shows some separation (see pictures), small headstock chip, light hardware oxidation. Electronics working.

Includes original hard case.

item.title: Hofner Pro Edition Club Bass 2024 - 70's Green — $300
item.description:
$300 · Very Good · Shawn's Gear Locker

Only played a few times... works and sounds great.

item.title: Ibanez Prestige SR-3005E 5-String Bass MIJ Fujigen - 2004 — $1,999.99
item.description:
$1,999.99 · Very Good · Northwest Vintage Guitars

Northwest Vintage Guitars presents a rare and amazing Ibanez Prestige SR3005E 5-string bass with the IBZ SFR M-B/N passive pickups with a Vari-mid 3-band EQ to get ALL the tones.  It's a solid Mahogany double cutaway body and a Wenge, Bubinga neck with a Wenge fretboard and 24 frets.  Just and incredible bass in fantastic condition.  34" scale, 14" radius, 8.79 lbs.  Comes safely packed and fully insured in the Ibanez hard case in the photos.  

The nut measures 1.77", neck depth is .88"-.95" at the 1st and 12th frets respectively.  It's a flat D profile that feels like an old friend.  Freshly strung and accurately intonated with 45-130 nickel round wound strings and low 2.0mm-1.2mm action.  The frets are level, crowned, and polished and the fretboard is cleaned and conditioned.  The neck is straight, the truss rod turns in both directions, and the relief is currently set for optimum playability.  There are a few dings as pictured.  It remains in excellent playable condition with no dead spots. 

We only consider local trades in person.  Most questions can be answered with a quick read of our info page.  This item is offered on our website and other online marketing platforms and subject to prior sale.  Please check our website for additional photos.

Buy with confidence. We offer a 7 day money-back return on all used guitars - all our guitars are guaranteed and a full refund will be issued if not received in the condition it was described and pictured.  We do allow “buy & try” preference returns and the buyer pays shipping charges.  Please read our shop policies for more information.   All our guitars are deep cleaned and have received a professional service and setup - an average of a $200 value. You will not get a filthy guitar from us.  If you are particular about cosmetic appearance, please message us for more details.  Additionally, all our guitars are shipped fully insured, and we will assist with any claims that may arise.  See the details on our Storefront.

Please ensure your address and phone number on this platform is the correct shipping address and contact info before purchasing.  We cannot change addresses, phones, or names after purchase.  Some shipping charges may be due before shipping if the actual shipping is more than advertised.  Platform rules prohibit dealing around the platform through messages so please don’t use messages on this platform to ask us to contact you outside of the platform.     

We are located in the Pacific Northwest USA and are exclusively online.

item.title: Squier Vintage Modified '77 Jazz Bass 2011 - 2018 - Black — $275
item.description:
$275 · Good · 2313's Gear Outlet

Solid! It’s got a few small dings and a rash on the lower bout.

item.title: Gibson EB-4L Long Scale 1972 - 1979 - Cherry — $1,750
item.description:
$1,750 · Very Good · Yooptone Music

I know it looks like a walnut model, but is definitely a cherry that has faded. The back shows more of the cherry finish. The bass is mostly original. The switch has been reattached (see the extra screws). It doesn't seem to have the function it should. Back and middle positions sound the same (though good), and the forward position is very weak. Bottom point on the pickguard has broken off. Nice finish checking, dings and scratches from years of play. Comfortable neck. Set up with flatwounds. Original case has seen better days--it holds the bass but there is some separation on the bottom as shown. Super cool vintage Gibby bass!

item.title: Fender Music Master Bass 1978 - Blue — $900
item.description:
$900 · Fair · Shawn's Gear Locker

1978 Fender Music Master bass. Serial # S835490.

The finish is not perfect but it does play nice but may need some tweaking to be perfect.

item.title: Mayones Cali 5 - Wenge — $2,068.44
item.description:
$2,068.44 · Brand New · Zjon's Guitarstore

Mayones Cali 5 - Wenge

Mayones Guitars Shop / Zjon's Guitarstore - "Mayones Dealer of the year"
The premier shop to find your Mayones guitar & bass.
Can't find what you're looking for? Not a problem. We always have a fantastic selection of bass guitars on order and some of them are still available.

Some cool ideas for a custom order? Let us know. Check out our extensive collection of Mayones Bass & Guitars!

DO YOU KNOW WHAT IS THE NAME OF A SMALL CALEDONIUS? Neck-through-body construction (in both wenge and maple versions), beautiful top woods, highest quality fit & finish – no step has been skipped to ensure that Cali are 100% up to Mayones quality you expect.

It has also one additional feature – Cali is a perfect travel companion due to its compact size and built-in headphone amp. It’s easy to carry, pack and set up to play everywhere & every time.

Our goal and intention is to save as much wood as we can in our production pipeline – Cali is built from leftovers of quality woods we use for our full-size instruments, which are too small to use in a regular-sized instrument. It`s available in a limited number of copies per year, in direct sales only and comes with or without the built-in headphone preamp.The answer is Cali!

It might be half the size of our custom series basses, but it carries the same design philosophy & great tone, playability and highest attention to built quality and ergonomy.

Specs:

WOODS&CONSTRUCTION
RADIUS:16"
WOOD - Neck:Mahogany-Maple-Amazaque-Wenge 11PLY
WOOD - Fretboard:Pau Ferro
WOOD - Headstock:Top-matching
FRETS:FERD WAGNER Nickel Silver / 2.64×1.20
FRETS - Number:24
CONSTRUCTION:Neck-Thru-Body
SCALE:Mini Bass / 436mm
WOOD - Top:Wenge
WOOD - Body:Black Limba
CONFIG - Pickups:H (Bridge)

COLOR&FINISH
COLOUR - Body (top):Trans Natural Satine
COLOUR - Body (back):Trans Black Satine
COLOUR - Neck:Trans Natural Satine
COLOUR - Headstock:Trans Natural Satine

ELECTRONICS&HARDWARE
ELECTRONICS:Velvetrone 3-Band CC Preamp and M-Heaphones system 2024(1xVol Push-Pull, 1xMid,
1xTreble/Bass)
SWITCHES&SOCKETS:SWITCHCRAFT 1/4 in, Headphones 1/8 in, Aux Jack 1/8 in, USB-C Outlet
PICKUPS - Bass:Velvetrone Noble 5 Bridge
BRIDGE - Bass:Mayones X24-BLK / Two-piece Bass Bridge 5 / Black
TUNERS - Bass:Mayones MB-1070-BK-PE
NUT:Ebony
ACCESSORIES - Colour:Black
ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT:SCHALLER Schaller Security Lock / Black, Mayones Soft Case

item.title: Mayones Jabba Bassic 5 VF - Antique Black Matt — $3,448.05
item.description:
$3,448.05 · Brand New · Zjon's Guitarstore

Mayones Jabba Bassic 5 VF - Antique Black Matt

Mayones Guitars Shop / Zjon's Guitarstore - "Mayones Dealer of the year"
The premier shop to find your Mayones guitar & bass.
Can't find what you're looking for? Not a problem. We always have a fantastic selection of bass guitars on order and some of them are still available.

Some cool ideas for a custom order? Let us know. Check out our extensive collection of Mayones Bass Guitars.

Specs:

WOODS & CONSTRUCTION
RADIUS:20″
WOOD – Neck:Maple / 1pc, Two Carbon Rods
WOOD – Fretboard:Ebony
MARKERS – Side:Luminlay / SB-20 / Side Dots / Super Blue / 2mm
MARKERS - Front:White Pearloid Double Offset 4mm dot markers
FRETS:FERD WAGNER Nickel Silver / 2,80 × 1,47
CONSTRUCTION:Bolt-On
SCALE:33-35" multiscale
WOOD – Body:Sassafras
CONFIG – Pickups:J-J

COLOR & FINISH
COLOUR – Body (top):Antique Black Matt
COLOUR – Body (back):Antique Black Matt
COLOUR – Neck:Antique Black Matt
COLOUR – Headstock:Antique Black Matt

ELECTRONICS & HARDWARE
ELECTRONICS:Velvetrone / MUSASHI-3EQ / 3-Band EQ / Vol, Bal, Mid, Tre/Bass, PassiveTone + Active-Passive Miniswitch
Volume (Push-Pull)
SWITCHES & SOCKETS:SWITCHCRAFT Jack 1⁄4 in, Aux Jack 1/8 in, USB-C Outlet, Headphones Jack 1/8 in
PICKUPS – Bass:Velvetrone Noble VF pickups
BRIDGE – Bass:MAYONES
TUNERS – Bass:Hipshot Ultralite Clover Chrome 4 + 1
NUT:Plastic
ACCESSORIES – Colour:Black
ADDITIONAL EQUIPMENT:Schaller Security Lock / Black, Mayones Hiscox Case

item.title: Dingwall SP1 4-String - Matte Ducati Pearl White — $2,413.33
item.description:
$2,413.33 · Brand New · Zjon's Guitarstore

Dingwall SP1 4-String - Matte Ducati Pearl White

Weight:3,65kg

The SP1 is the latest addition to our ever-expanding Ready To Play range and, as the model name suggests, draws much of its inspiration from the Custom Shop Super P. The initial brief was to come up with a more affordable instrument that combined elements of Leo Fender’s iconic blueprint with some of the innovative features for which Dingwall Guitars are now famous, including the customary multi-scale fingerboard. Select 4- or 5-strings, and from Metallic Black, Vintageburst, Dark Candy Green, and Ducati Pearl White finishes.

BODY & NECK
The first thing we did was to make the body profile thinner, so you get a lightweight body, but with a more solid tone. The body is alder, while the bolt-on neck is a single piece of maple. The rosewood fingerboard is flawlessly finished, with smoothly rounded edges and 22 banjo-sized frets.

Aside from the multi-scale design, visually, the first thing you’ll notice that’s different about the SP1 is the scratchplate, which started out as a hand-painted design by Hugh Fisher. We’ve now digitized Hugh’s designs and had them UV printed. Each one is slightly transparent, so the colour of the body also influences the look of the pickguard. And because the pickguard material is transparent, we can print any colour.

“I don’t think it’s coincidental that the bassists who first recognized Dingwall’s potential were session guys who play and record bass day in, day out. These players need a versatile instrument that can deliver a studio-quality sound, be comfortable to play and remain straightforward to use. The Dingwall SP1 ticks all those boxes, and you can expect to see a lot more of them around in the future.” – Sheldon Dingwall

PICKUPS & ELECTRONICS
The SP1 is passive, so there are no batteries or EQ boost, but the quality of the tonewoods, alnico-loaded pickups, and the overall construction mean that there’s absolutely no need for them. The front control is volume, and the back is a master tone. Between these is our Quad-Tone Pickup Selector. In its first position, fully clockwise, this selects the front pickup alone; one click clockwise is the front plus the back pickup in series, then in parallel; and finally, the back pickup on its own.

We spent years refining the pickup design for the SP1, and the end result has been so successful that we’re now using the same concept in our Custom Shop Super P.” – Sheldon Dingwall.“

HARDWARE
The Dingwall Minimalist bridge features a custom riser system that’s designed to provide an increased range of flexibility when it comes to adjusting the action. If you play with a heavy technique, instead of raising your individual bridge saddles, which can put stress on the string and cause premature breakage, you can raise the entire bridge unit. That way you can move between a high action or a low action just by adjusting the shims, which leaves the saddles only for fine tuning. The tuners are lightweight, open-gear designs, and there is also a bullet string retainer to help maintain a decent break angle across the Graphtech nut.

DINGWALL STRINGS
Dingwall strings have been meticulously tested to maximize performance and deliver a tone that blends effortlessly with any style of music. We were the first company to design strings specifically for multi-scale instruments. Available in both nickel and stainless steel, our strings provide an even tension for optimal balance, letting you experience the warmest highs and the tightest lows possible.

Note: basses are shipped with Dingwall Nickel Strings as standard.

SPECS

Made in:Indonesia / Canada (Hybrid Manufacturing)
Body:Alder
Neck:1-piece Maple, Bolt-On
Fingerboard:Rosewood
Scale Length:4-String: 32" to 34.25", 5-String: 32" to 35"
Pickups:Dingwall Dual-P (Neck); Dingwall FD3n (Bridge)
Electronics:Passive
Controls:Master volume, 4-Position Quad-Tone pickup selector, Master tone
Bridge:Dingwall ‘Minimalist’ one-piece bridge
String Spacing at the Bridge:19mm (4-string), 18mm (5-string)
Pickup Selector:Position 1: Bridge Solo, Position 2: Bridge/Neck (Parallel), Position 3: Bridge/Neck (Series), Position 4:Neck Solo
Tuners:Open gear
Nut:Graphtech Black Tusq
Case:Dingwall Padded Gigbag Included

item.title: Fender Affinity Series Jaguar H Bass Guitar, Charcoal Frost Metallic (USED) — $299.99
item.description:
$299.99 · Excellent · Centre Music House

Our Notes: In Excellent condition. The back of the headstock has been stamped with the word, "USED," indicating that this is a factory second. Aside from that, this bass is practically mint, who no outstanding imperfections!

An excellent entry point into the storied Fender® family, the Squier® Affinity Series® Jaguar® Bass H brings iconic style and classic tone to today's up-and-coming bassist. This Jaguar Bass offers a number of player-friendly features including a thin, lightweight body, a comfortable 32" medium scale length, and vintage-style open-gear tuners for precise, reliable tuning. Equipped with a Squier humbucking pickup that delivers punchy tone, this bass is a great choice for players at any level.

Product Features:

  • Thin and lightweight body
  • 32" medium scale length
  • Squier humbucking pickup
  • Slim and comfortable "C"-shaped neck profile
  • Open-gear tuning machines

Product Specs:

BODY 

  • BODY MATERIAL Poplar
  • BODY FINISH Gloss Polyurethane
  • BODY SHAPE Jaguar® Bass

ELECTRONICS 

  • BRIDGE PICKUP Ceramic Humbucker
  • CONTROLS Master Volume, Master Tone
  • PICKUP CONFIGURATION H
  • SWITCHING None

GENERAL 

  • COLOR Charcoal Frost Metallic
  • ORIENTATION Right-Hand
  • SERIES Affinity Series®
  • BASS WEIGHT 8lbs 1.8oz

HARDWARE 

  • BRIDGE 4-Saddle Standard
  • CONTROL KNOBS Black Plastic
  • HARDWARE FINISH Chrome
  • NECK PLATE 4-Bolt Squier®
  • PICKGUARD 3-Ply Black
  • PICKUP COVERS Black
  • STRAP BUTTONS Standard
  • STRING TREES Vintage-Style Disc
  • TUNING MACHINES Vintage-Style

NECK 

  • FINGERBOARD MATERIAL Indian Laurel
  • FINGERBOARD RADIUS 9.5" (241 mm)
  • NECK CONSTRUCTION Bolt-On
  • NECK FINISH Satin Urethane
  • NECK MATERIAL Maple
  • NECK SHAPE "C" Shape
  • NUMBER OF FRETS 20
  • NUT MATERIAL Synthetic Bone
  • NUT WIDTH 1.5" (38.1 mm)
  • POSITION INLAYS Pearloid Dot
  • SIDE DOTS White
  • STRING NUT Synthetic Bone
  • TRUSS ROD Head Adjust

MEASUREMENTS 

  • FRET SIZE Medium Jumbo
  • SCALE LENGTH 32" (813 mm)

item.title: Fender American Ultra II Jazz Bass V w/ Maple Fingerboard- Sinister Red 2026 (US26008841) — $2,519.99
item.description:
$2,519.99 · Brand New · Miami-Guitars

Miami-Guitars is an authorized Fender Showcase Dealer/ Factory warranty included. If you have any questions or concerns regarding the instrument of your interest, please send us a message or give us a call.

Weight: 10 lbs 7.1 oz


Built for players boldly seeking the best, American Ultra II is our most advanced series of instruments. American Ultra II guitars and basses feature premium materials, precision craftsmanship and cutting-edge design for instruments that both advance the state-of-the-art and stand the test of time.

The Fender® American Ultra II Jazz Bass® V features a select alder body with sculpted body contours. For effortless playability, the quartersawn maple neck features our Modern D profile and smooth Ultra Satin finish. Ebony or quartersawn maple 10”-14” compound radius fingerboards feature Ultra rolled edges, medium-jumbo frets, Luminlay® side dots and Graph Tech® TUSQ® nuts. The tapered neck heel and sculpted body contours allow unparalleled access to the higher register, while the truss rod access at the headstock provides convenient and easy setup and adjustment.

Outfitted with a set of specially designed Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass pickups, this bass delivers a massive tonal range, from vintage warmth to modern snap, all without a hint of hum. The redesigned preamp features unprecedented control to unlock endless tonal possibilities. Key features include S-1™ switching for active/passive operation, passive tone control and 3-band active EQ with switchable midrange frequency. Additional road-ready features including an adjustable HiMass™ top-load or string-through-body bridge, Fender light-weight tuners with tapered shafts, knurled aluminum knobs and 1-ply anodized aluminum pickguard.

The American Ultra II Jazz Bass V infuses iconic style with advanced appointments to take your playing to stratospheric new heights. For players who demand flawless tone, infinite versatility and limitless performance, American Ultra II delivers.


Features

  • Select Alder Body with Ultra Contours and Sculpted Neck Heel
  • Graphite Reinforced Quartersawn Maple Modern “D” Profile Neck with Posiflex™ Support Rods
  • 10"-14" Compound Radius Ebony or Quartersawn Maple Fingerboard with Ultra Rolled Edges and Luminlay Side Dots
  • Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass® Pickups
  • Ultra II Active Bass Preamp With S-1™ Switching
  • 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ Bridge (String-Through-Body or Top-Load) and Deluxe Fluted-Shaft Tuners

Body

Body Material: Select Alder
Body Finish: Gloss Urethane
Body Shape: Jazz Bass®


Neck

Neck Material: Quartersawn Maple
Neck Construction: 5-Bolt
Neck Finish: Ultra Satin Urethane
Neck Shape: Modern "D"
Scale Length: 34" (86.36 cm)
Fingerboard Material: Quartersawn Maple
Fingerboard Radius: 10" to 14" Compound Radius (254 mm to 355.6 mm)
Number of Frets: 21
Fret Size: Medium Jumbo
Nut Material: Graph Tech® TUSQ®
Nut Width: 1.875" (47.6 mm)
Position Inlays: Black Pearloid Dot - 7 mm
Side Dots: Luminlay®
Truss Rod: Bi-Flex™


Electronics

Bridge Pickup: Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Middle Pickup: Ultra II Noiseless™ Vintage Jazz Bass®
Controls: Master Volume (with S-1™ Switch), Pan Pot (Pickup Selector), Stacked Concentric Midrange Boost/Cut + Passive Tone Control, Stacked Concentric Treble Boost/Cut + Bass Boost/Cut, Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector
Switching: Pan Pot
Configuration: SS
Special Electronics: S-1™ Switch on Volume Selects Active Mode (Up Position) or Passive Mode (Down Position); 2-Way Mini-Toggle Midrange Frequency Selector (325 Hz or 750 Hz)


Hardware

Bridge: 5-Saddle Adjustable HiMass™ (String-Through-Body or Top-Load)
Hardware Finish: Nickel/Chrome
Tuning Machines: Fender® "F" Light-Weight Vintage-Paddle Keys with Tapered Shafts
Pickguard: 1-Ply Black Anodized Aluminum
Control Knobs: Heavy Knurled Flat-Top
Neck Plate: 5-Bolt


Miscellaneous

Strings: Fender® USA 7250-5M Nickel Plated Steel (.045-.125 Gauges), PN 0737250456
Legal Notice: WARNING: Cancer and Reproductive Harm - .


Accessories

Case/Gig Bag: Deluxe Molded Case (Included)

item.title: Fender MIJ Traditional '60s Precision Bass Midnight — $1,073.14
item.description:
$1,073.14 · Very Good · Boris' Attic

Fender Precision Bass – Made in Japan – Midnight limited edition


Selling this stunning and elegant Precision Bass in a sleek black and gold finish, made in Japan.

It looks amazing, but more importantly, it sounds incredible. Easily one of the best-sounding basses I’ve ever owned.


100% original, no mods.

Made in Japan, known for high-quality craftsmanship.

It delivers great tone across all styles: rock, funk, soul, indie, you name it.


Condition: overall nearly mint, with just one small ding on the back of the body.

Fairly lightweight and super comfortable to play.

Strung with roundwound strings.


A gigbag can be included if needed, though the bottom is worn.

item.title: Sire Marcus Miller P8 5 string 2025 - Natural — $820
item.description:
$820 · Excellent · Joshua Johnson

Comes with the case, Strap Locks and LEKATO Strap. Works great and sounds great.
